title: Fractal Block World
description: Based off of a game with the same name.
body:
# General
Based off of the game with the same name, Fractal Block World adds a lot of things from sid game. This mod is made using [MCreator](https://mcreator.net/) (because i don't know how to code in java).

[Original game's Steam page](https://store.steampowered.com/app/1540570/Fractal_Block_World/)

# Features (as of 0.1β)

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>
  
- **Concrete** (block)
- **Concrete X** (block)
- **Yellow Concrete** (block)
- **Small Yellow Flower** (structure)
- **Small Yellow Flower Core** (block)
- **Ying Forest** (biome)
- **Ying World** (dimension)
- **Ying Flower** (block/structure)
- **Ying Flower Core** (block)
- **Red Ring Device** (item)

</details>



# Have a question? Found a bug? Need more content?
You can ask a question, suggest new featues or report a bug [here](https://github.com/WiktorProj/fbw-mod-q-and-i)!
